title: kernel security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[4.18.0-553.78.1_10.OL8]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.3
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34750652]
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985772]

[4.18.0-553.78.1_10]
- mm/migrate: set swap entry values of THP tail pages properly. (Luiz Capitulino) [RHEL-101302]
- smb: client: fix use-after-free in cifs_oplock_break (Paulo Alcantara) [RHEL-111190] {CVE-2025-38527}
- NFS: Fix filehandle bounds checking in nfs_fh_to_dentry() (CKI Backport Bot) [RHEL-113603] {CVE-2025-39730}
full_text:
[4.18.0-553.78.1_10.OL8]
- Update Oracle Linux certificates (Kevin Lyons)
- Disable signing for aarch64 (Ilya Okomin)
- Oracle Linux RHCK Module Signing Key was added to the kernel trusted keys list (olkmod_signing_key.pem) [Orabug: 29539237]
- Update x509.genkey [Orabug: 24817676]
- Conflict with shim-ia32 and shim-x64 <= 15.3-1.0.3
- Remove upstream reference during boot (Kevin Lyons) [Orabug: 34750652]
- Add new Oracle Linux Driver Signing (key 1) certificate [Orabug: 37985772]

[4.18.0-553.78.1_10]
- mm/migrate: set swap entry values of THP tail pages properly. (Luiz Capitulino) [RHEL-101302]
- smb: client: fix use-after-free in cifs_oplock_break (Paulo Alcantara) [RHEL-111190] {CVE-2025-38527}
- NFS: Fix filehandle bounds checking in nfs_fh_to_dentry() (CKI Backport Bot) [RHEL-113603] {CVE-2025-39730}

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-17397.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-38527.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-39730.html
